task_completion.description: Load the specified pre-recorded EEG session file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI is open in playback mode, and the file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' is visible in the file selection or playback source area.

task_completion.description: Open the Focus widget in the OpenBCI GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Focus Widget' (or a widget clearly labeled 'Focus') is open and visible in one of the GUI panels.

task_completion.description: Configure the Focus widget to monitor Alpha waves.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the Focus widget settings or display, 'Alpha' is selected or highlighted as the target metric or frequency band.

task_completion.description: Configure the Focus widget to monitor Channel 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the Focus widget settings or display, Channel '8' is selected as the active or target channel.

task_completion.description: Ensure the widget is active and responding to the playback data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The playback is running (e.g., the play/pause button indicates it is playing, the time slider is progressed) and the Focus widget shows active data, such as a populated graph or changing metric values.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI interface is visible and being used, rather than a terminal window, text editor, or script modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent loaded the file through the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' is shown loaded within the OpenBCI GUI's specific file selection dropdown or path input, not just typed into a generic text field.

integrity.description: The results show genuine software playback rather than mocked data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GUI displays consistent signs of active playback, such as moving time series graphs in other widgets, a progressing timeline, and active data streams, rather than a static or disconnected interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target recording file is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. The required widget is the 'Focus Widget'. The widget must be configured to monitor the 'Alpha' metric specifically on Channel '8'.
